state.next-action: `12-01` is landed: Grime Time now has first-party `organizations` and `organization-memberships`, role-template entitlement helpers, the default staff org maps Clerk org `org_3BmXmwG7NpGNO1JKpE3MkR667Mm` as external state instead of a primary app key, membership-based Payload admin access is wired into auth/admin guards, and internal `@grimetime.app` users bootstrap into the staff org without making Clerk the authorization source of truth. Next slice is `12-02`: build admin/workspace controls to assign memberships, promote or demote role templates, and lock or unlock entitlements from Grime Time itself, while `11-05` still retains the remaining Supabase-retirement and Stripe-customer-id linkage cleanup.
